{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = House Eternal
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Zorova]] belongs to the [[House Eternal]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
